title: Designing for Accessibility
scenario: Create a paragraph describing a new line of wearable technology designed for people with visual impairments. The paragraph should highlight the device's ability to provide real-time audio descriptions of surroundings, detect obstacles, and offer personalized feedback to users. The output should be a 160-word piece of text that is clear, concise, and free of technical jargon.
constraints: Must include at least 2 specific features of the wearable technology

evaluationCriteria.description: The tone of the description should be empathetic, informative, and accessible to a wide audience.
The output should meet the specified constraints: under 160 words, active voice, and at least 2 specific features of the wearable technology.
The output should accurately convey the device's capabilities and benefits for people with visual impairments.
